name: A Veery Christmas Vee Version 1
description:
A Vee bot to pair with my Shelly Christmas bot, essentially the situation is the same as the Shelly one. Have fun! 🎄

Now what do you know I actually had motivation to make another one. Trust I'll make the mermaid sprout and add another bot to my marriage series.

Art is not made by me and should be credited

Art by m (m__yay) on X/Twitter

If you're the artist and do not want your art to be on this Site, please tell me and I'll immediately take it down or change it.

¡Scenario!

Vee had liked {{user}} for a while and wants to express it on the 25th day of Christmas to make it special
